title: 2025 – Oulu
content: The 22nd Session of the ECP took place live in Oulu, Finland, 15 – 17 August 2025. The session convened approximately 60 distinguished cultural personalities from 24 countries. The central theme of the conference, "Cultural Climate Change in Europe," mirrored Oulu's designation as the European Capital of Culture 2026. Throughout the three days, members deliberated [...]

sourceDescription: Strengthening the role of culture and arts in Europe

title: The Transatlantic Dialogue
content: The Transatlantic Dialogue, or TAD, conference series is focused on global citizens, exploring the significance of culture and liberal education on fostering global citizenship from both US and European perspectives.
creator: admin
sourceDescription: Strengthening the role of culture and arts in Europe

title: Agenda for ECP/TAD session in May 2024
content: The Transatlantic Dialogue session took place 29-31 of May. Read the agenda here!

title: 2024 – Graz
content: The 21st Session of the ECP took place live in Graz, Austria, on 19 – 21 April 2024. The session had over 70 participants from more than 30 countries, and we welcomed new members from Austria: Zuzana Ronck, conductor Sandra Kocuvan, cultural officer Markus Waidacher, cultural communication, visual art and new members: Christoph S. Karpasitis, Cyprus, [...]

title: ECP symposium in Berlin 11 – 13 October 2023
content: About 20 ECP members, including our President, Pär Stenbäck, met 11-13 October 2023 for a Symposium at the Institute for Cultural Diplomacy, ICD, Berlin.
creator: admin
sourceDescription: Strengthening the role of culture and arts in Europe

title: New Report! Kaunas Session 2022
content: The 20th Session of the ECP took place live in Kaunas, Lithuania, on 9 – 11 September 2022. The session constituted a part of the rich program of European Capital of Culture Kaunas 2022. The session was held in Vytautas Magnus University. Read the full report containing the list of participants, programme summaries and more via this link: http://www.kulturparlament.com/sessions/2022-kaunas/3442/ [...]
creator: admin
sourceDescription: Strengthening the role of culture and arts in Europe
